task: place the butter dairy in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue bowl with an orange inside sits on a wooden table. A blue plastic basket is on the right. A brown circular object is on the table. The yellow object is a butter dairy with a yellow label, positioned on the table. STRATEGY - First, grasp the butter dairy. Then, transport it to the sink (implied to be the blue basket). Finally, place it inside the basket. Failure modes include dropping the butter dairy during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the butter dairy body. Step 2: Grasp the butter dairy body. Step 3: Transport the butter dairy to the blue basket. Step 4: Place the butter dairy inside the blue basket.
Goal: inside(butter_dairy, blue_basket)
Scene: blue_bowl, orange, blue_basket, brown_circular_object, butter_dairy
Step 1: reach(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the butter_dairy
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, butter_dairy, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, butter_dairy) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the butter_dairy
  contact: holding(butter_dairy) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(butter_dairy)
Step 3: transport(butter_dairy -> blue_basket)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue_basket
  spatial: above(butter_dairy, blue_basket, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(butter_dairy)
  done_when: above(butter_dairy, blue_basket, 0.05)
Step 4: place(butter_dairy -> blue_basket)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue_basket
  contact: surface_contact(butter_dairy, blue_basket) [completion]; released(butter_dairy) [completion]
  pose: stable(butter_dairy) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(butter_dairy, blue_basket) AND released(butter_dairy)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue_basket
an empty area inside the blue_basket
